# HPD.ML.BinaryClassification.LogisticRegressionLearner

- Package: `HPD-ML-BinaryClassification` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.BinaryClassification`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.BinaryClassification`
- Kind: `class`
- Guide: [Related documentation](../../../training/binary-classification/logistic-regression.md)

Logistic regression via L-BFGS optimization. Loss function: -Σ[y·log(σ(w·x+b)) + (1-y)·log(1-σ(w·x+b))] / n L-BFGS uses analytic gradients and gradient history to approximate the inverse Hessian.

## Declaration

```csharp

```
